## Checklist

- [ ] `bun test` passes
- [ ] `bun run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `bun run lint` passes
- [ ] `bun run fmt:check` passes
- [ ] If rendering output changed intentionally, `test/fixtures/golden_render.png`
      was regenerated (see CONTRIBUTING.md) and the PR explains why
- [ ] New behavior has test coverage

## Does this add a dependency or native binding?

If yes: please open an issue to discuss first, before investing time in the
